theorem procedural_Pi_ringHom_injective_90ace3f0989e : (True →
    (∀ {I : Type _} {f : I → Type _} {γ : Type _} [Nonempty I] [(i : I) → NonAssocSemiring (f i)] [NonAssocSemiring γ]
      (g : (i : I) → γ →+* f i) (hg : ∀ (i : I), Function.Injective ⇑(g i)), Function.Injective ⇑(Pi.ringHom g))) ∧
  (∀ {R : Type _} [NonUnitalNonAssocRing R] (a b c d : R),
    a * associator b c d - associator (a * b) c d + associator a (b * c) d - associator a b (c * d) +
        associator a b c * d =
      0) := by
  sorry
tasks.title: Procedural Pi.ringHom_injective
tasks.type_expr:
(True →
    (∀ {I : Type _} {f : I → Type _} {γ : Type _} [Nonempty I] [(i : I) → NonAssocSemiring (f i)] [NonAssocSemiring γ]
      (g : (i : I) → γ →+* f i) (hg : ∀ (i : I), Function.Injective ⇑(g i)), Function.Injective ⇑(Pi.ringHom g))) ∧
  (∀ {R : Type _} [NonUnitalNonAssocRing R] (a b c d : R),
    a * associator b c d - associator (a * b) c d + associator a (b * c) d - associator a b (c * d) +
        associator a b c * d =
      0)

theorem procedural_IsIdempotentElem_sub_iff_a068a731cc2c : (True →
    (∀ {R : Type _} [NonUnitalRing R] [IsAddTorsionFree R] {p q : R} (hp : IsIdempotentElem p)
      (hq : IsIdempotentElem q), IsIdempotentElem (q - p) ↔ p * q = p ∧ q * p = p)) ∧
  (∀ {α : Type _} {s : Finset α} {p q : α → Prop} [DecidablePred p] [DecidablePred q],
    Disjoint (Finset.filter p s) (Finset.filter q s) ↔ ∀ x ∈ s, p x → ¬q x) := by
  sorry
tasks.title: Procedural IsIdempotentElem.sub_iff
tasks.type_expr:
(True →
    (∀ {R : Type _} [NonUnitalRing R] [IsAddTorsionFree R] {p q : R} (hp : IsIdempotentElem p)
      (hq : IsIdempotentElem q), IsIdempotentElem (q - p) ↔ p * q = p ∧ q * p = p)) ∧
  (∀ {α : Type _} {s : Finset α} {p q : α → Prop} [DecidablePred p] [DecidablePred q],
    Disjoint (Finset.filter p s) (Finset.filter q s) ↔ ∀ x ∈ s, p x → ¬q x)
